channel.title: Budget Build Bench
channel.description: Fresh takes for PC builders on a budget.

item.title: Ask the forge: your benchmarks questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the benchmarks questions PC builders on a budget keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in upgrades with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest upgrades adjustments that PC builders on a budget report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: used pc parts guide
item.description: The persistent myths around used pc parts guide, stress-tested against what PC builders on a budget actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your gpus in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying gpus project for PC builders on a budget — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/pcmasterrace is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the benchmarks community this week.

item.title: The upgrades checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified upgrades purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of used parts
item.description: The most common early stumbles in used parts, and the cheap corrections that fix them for PC builders on a budget.

item.title: "1440p value build" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about 1440p value build through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: "best budget gpu 2026" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about best budget gpu 2026 through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.
